summary: Tested all new Quant Intelligence modules (8 endpoints + 1 dashboard) and Quant Intelligence frontend page. Fixed critical numpy.bool serialization bug in dark_pool_detector.py. All 21 quant API tests passed (100%). All 22 existing API tests passed (100%). Frontend Quant page fully functional with all 8 sections visible.

fixed_issues.issue: numpy.bool and numpy.float64 not JSON serializable causing 500 error on /api/quant/dark-pool/{symbol}
fixed_issues.fix: Wrapped numpy types with bool() and float() in return dict

quant_backend: GET /api/quant/pipeline/RELIANCE returns pipeline analysis with steps array
GET /api/quant/pipeline works for all 5 watchlist symbols (RELIANCE, HDFCBANK, ICICIBANK, INFY, TCS)
GET /api/quant/options-flow/TCS returns valid options flow data
GET /api/quant/ai-prediction/INFY returns valid prediction with factors
GET /api/quant/hedge-analysis returns exposure data with hedge_needed boolean
GET /api/quant/dashboard returns portfolio, frequency_control, hedge_analysis, watchlist_intelligence, strategy_performance
Quant dashboard equity curve data structure validated
R:R ratio displayed correctly in dashboard (1:2)
existing_apis: All 22 existing API tests passed (auth, data, portfolio, report, health, market, strategies, positions, trades, risk, fo, audit, config, mode)
frontend_quant: Login and navigate to Quant Intelligence page
Portfolio stats cards visible (Portfolio value, Win Rate, Max Drawdown, Day P&L)
Frequency Control section shows trading window 09:30-14:45 IST, Min R:R 1:2.0, Min Rank Score 85/100
Hedge Analysis section shows net exposure and hedge_needed status
Equity Curve chart displays portfolio growth over time
Watchlist Intelligence table shows 5 symbols with signals, options flow, AI data, RSI
Pipeline Analysis section with input field and RUN PIPELINE button works
Pipeline returns SKIP when signal is HOLD (expected behavior)
Strategy Performance table displays strategy metrics
existing_pages: Dashboard page loads with AI Market Regime banner
Portfolio page loads with equity curve
Market Analysis page loads with indices and gainers/losers
Trade History page loads with 21 trades

critical_code_review_comments: Dark pool detector fixed - numpy types now properly converted to native Python types
All new quant endpoints have proper data-testid attributes for testing
Pipeline correctly returns SKIP when signal is HOLD (not actionable)
Time filter correctly blocks trades outside 09:30-14:45 IST window
seed_data_creation: Existing 21 trades from previous testing; quant endpoints use deterministic price generation
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 8 quant API endpoints working. Dark pool endpoint was fixed (numpy serialization issue). Pipeline returns SKIP for HOLD signals and FAIL outside trading hours (09:30-14:45 IST) - this is expected behavior. Frontend Quant Intelligence page fully functional with all sections: Portfolio stats, Frequency Control, Hedge Analysis, Equity Curve, Watchlist Intelligence, Pipeline Analysis, Strategy Performance.

mocked_apis_list: /api/quant/* endpoints use generated price data for demo (deterministic per symbol per day)
/api/market/live returns seeded market data as fallback
